title: macrotybus luteus
intro: Macrotybus luteus, also known as yellow bugle or wood bugle, is a flowering plant species in the borage family, Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Macrotybus luteus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Macrotybus luteus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
